name: /compliance-remove: refuses to remove a default-bundled entry without an explicit --force-default flag (safety against accidental loss)
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf -- '- id: soc2-tsc
  name: SOC 2 TSC
  url: https://www.aicpa.org
  authoritative_publisher: AICPA
  jurisdiction: us
  applicable_to: [service-organizations]
  identifier_scheme: aicpa-tsc
  why_authoritative: |
    a
    b
    c
  fetch_frequency: monthly
  legal_review_required: false
  paywalled: false
  origin: bundled-default
' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-remove.sh" soc2-tsc --catalog "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml"
